meta.landingTitle: Simple CRM for small sales teams

hero.subtitle: A simple Czech CRM for small sales teams. Works with ARES and automatically returns inactive companies to the shared pool. 30 days free, no card.
hero.cheapestBadge: The cheapest CRM on the market
hero.priceNote: with annual billing · {{monthly}} when billed monthly
hero.noCard: No credit card at sign-up. Register with Google or email.

diffs.title: What you get here (and nowhere else)
diffs.aresBody: Enter a company ID (IČO) and the company fills itself in — name, address, tax ID (DIČ), legal form. No copying from the web.
diffs.autoReleaseBody: A company assigned to a salesperson with no deal for 365 days returns to the shared pool. Nobody sits on a lead forever.
diffs.bulkEmailBody: Send a new offer to all your clients at once. Filter companies by industry and activity and send the email from your own address.
diffs.noBloatBody: No complex workflows or marketing automation. Just the tools a salesperson actually needs every day.

howItWorks.title: From sign-up to your first deal in 5 minutes
howItWorks.signupTitle: Sign up with Google or email
howItWorks.signupBody: One click with Google, or the classic email way. In 30 seconds you have an account, your team, and 30 days free.
howItWorks.firstCompanyBody: Enter a company ID (IČO) and ARES fills in the rest. Or upload a spreadsheet of companies in one go (soon).
howItWorks.pipelineBody: A Kanban overview with drag-and-drop. Won deals reset the 365-day company ownership clock.

landingPricing.title: One price, no games
landingPricing.paidSub: With annual billing. {{monthly}} when billed monthly. Cancel anytime, data in the EU.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.a1: We store all data in EU data centers (Hetzner, Frankfurt / Nuremberg). We comply with GDPR and will sign a data processing agreement on request.
faq.q2: How does the ARES integration work?
faq.a2: When creating a company you enter a company ID (IČO) and we query the public ARES registry. You get back the name, address, tax ID (DIČ), and legal form. Free, built into the app.
faq.q3: How are you different from Raynet or Pipedrive?
faq.a3: We're cheaper, simpler, Czech, and have two features you won't find elsewhere: one-click ARES and automatic company release after a year without a deal.
faq.q4: What if a company has more than 25 users?
faq.a4: No problem — the price is the same. We haven't launched an enterprise plan yet, but write to us and we'll work something out.
faq.q5: Can I export my data anytime?
faq.a5: Yes. CSV export is part of the app, even after your subscription ends. Your data stays yours.
faq.q6: How is billing handled and can I cancel?
faq.a6: Monthly in advance, cancel with one click in settings. After cancellation we keep your data for another 30 days, then delete it permanently.

footer.tagline: A simple Czech CRM for companies with up to 30 salespeople.
footer.comgateAria: Comgate payment gateway – Visa and Mastercard card payments

pipeline.title: Move deals — the stats respond
pipeline.dragHintPre: Try dragging a card between columns or clicking
pipeline.dragHintPost: . The team leaderboard and pipeline value recalculate in real time.
pipeline.emptySalesPre: No salesperson has won a deal yet. Move a card to the

calendar.title: Meetings on your deals. In one place.
calendar.subtitle: Schedule a meeting straight from a deal and track it in the built-in calendar. When you want, one checkbox also writes it to your Google Calendar.
calendar.syncOn: The event will also be written to your Google Calendar.
calendar.syncOff: The event stays only in SimpleCRM.
calendar.empty: No events — click a day with a scheduled meeting.

ares.title: Enter a company ID (IČO). The company fills itself in.
ares.subtitle: Try right here how quickly we fill in details from the public ARES registry. No copying from the web, no typos.
ares.hintEmpty: Enter 8 digits — or try one of the companies below.
ares.hintTyping: Keep typing — we'll search after 8 digits.
ares.notFound: We couldn't find company ID (IČO) {{ico}} in ARES. Check your input.
ares.error: ARES isn't responding right now. Try again in a moment.
ares.dataNotePre: Data comes live from the public ARES registry (
ares.dataNotePost: ). It works the same in the app — you just add the company straight to your CRM.

reports.title: Track exactly what you need
reports.subtitle: Customize your dashboard. Pick from 12 widgets, build your own layout, share results with CSV export.
reports.periodTablistAria: Select a period in the demo

cookie.bannerTextPre: This site uses cookies. We use essential cookies for the site to work correctly. With your consent we'll also use analytics and preference cookies to improve our service. You can change the detailed settings at any time. More information in the
cookie.settingsIntro: Choose which cookie categories to allow. The "Accept all" and "Reject all" buttons are equivalent.
cookie.catEssentialDesc: Without these cookies the site won't work (sign-in, storing your cookie choice). Legal basis — § 89(3) of Act No. 127/2005 Coll.
cookie.catAnalyticsDesc: Measuring traffic to improve the service. We run no analytics tool without your consent.
cookie.catPreferencesDesc: Remembering your preferences (e.g. the chosen theme).

cenik.title: Priced for what we offer.
cenik.subtitle: Same price no matter your team size. No commitments, no fluff. Try 30 days free and decide afterward.

kontakt.title: Contact
kontakt.lead: We're happy to help. The SimpleCRM team replies within a few hours on business days.
kontakt.vatNote: We are not VAT payers. Invoices are issued in accordance with the Czech Accounting Act.
kontakt.emailNote: For sales questions, technical support and complaints. We usually reply within a few hours on business days.
kontakt.phoneNote: Business days 9:00–17:00 CET. Outside business hours, please use email.
kontakt.supportPre: Complaints are accepted in writing only, at
kontakt.supportMid: . We resolve them within 30 days of receipt. The procedure, service-defect definitions and defective-performance rights are governed by the
kontakt.supportTermsLink: art. 10 of the Terms of Service
kontakt.legalLangNote: The legal documents are available in Czech only.
